zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Melton於1734年出生在美國維吉尼亞州布盧斯維其可時，她的父親Robert Melton38歲，母親Mary Elizabeth Farrar36歲。她於1748年與John Alex Sheffield在美國北卡羅來納州摩爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1799年在美國北卡羅來納州摩爾享年65歲，埋葬在美國北卡羅來納州摩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Melton于1734年出生在美国弗吉尼亚州布盧斯維其可时，她的父亲Robert Melton38岁，母亲Mary Elizabeth Farrar36岁。她于1748年与John Alex Sheffield在美国北卡罗来纳州摩爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1799年在美国北卡罗来纳州摩爾享年65岁，埋葬在美国北卡罗来纳州摩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Melton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middleton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Becomes the 10th state
historicEvents.description: On June 25, 1788 Virginia became the 10th state.

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Melton was born in 1734, in Brunswick, Virginia, United States, her father, Robert Melton, was 38 and her mother, Mary Elizabeth Farrar, was 36. She married John Alex Sheffield in 1748, in Moore, North Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1799, in Moore, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 65, and was buried in Moore, North Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Melton est née en 1734, à Brunswick, Virginie, États-Unis, son père, Robert Melton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mary Elizabeth Farrar, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John Alex Sheffield en 1748, à Moore, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1799, à Moore, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Moore, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis.

Sie hat 1748 in Moore, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten John Alex Sheffield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1799 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Moore, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Moore, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Melton è nata il nel 1734 nel Brunswick, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Robert Melton, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Mary Elizabeth Farrar, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John Alex Sheffield nel 1748, nel Moore, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1799, nel Moore, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Moore, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Meltonが1734年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ブルンスウィックで生まれた時，父Robert Meltonは38歳，母Mary Elizabeth Farrarは36歳であった。1748年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ムーアでJohn Alex Sheffieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1799年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ムーアで65歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ムーアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Melton(이)가 1734년 미국 버지니아 주 브런스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Melton(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth Farrar(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1748년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 무어에서 John Alex Sheffield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1799년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 무어에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 무어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Melton nasceu em 1734, em Brunswick, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Robert Melton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elizabeth Farrar, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Alex Sheffield em 1748, em Moore, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1799, em Moore, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Moore, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Melton родилась в 1734 г. в местности брунсвикк, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Robert Melton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth Farrar, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Alex Sheffield в 1748 г. в местности мур, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1799 г. в местности мур, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности мур, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Melton nació en 1734, en Brunswick, Virginia, Estados Unidos, su papá, Robert Melton, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mary Elizabeth Farrar, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John Alex Sheffield en 1748, en Moore, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1799, en Moore, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Moore, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos.
